releaseNotes:
_Date: 2026-04-08_

---

### ✨ What's New

#### 🤝 Agent-to-Agent (A2A) Protocol
Compass Partner now supports the **Agent-to-Agent integration protocol**, allowing agents to communicate and delegate work to each other — unlocking powerful multi-agent workflows directly from the desktop.

#### 🔗 LinkedIn MCP Tool
A **LinkedIn tool** is now available in the MCP gallery and can be installed directly from the Marketplace.

#### 🏢 SharePoint Site Search
Microsoft 365 integration is now extended with **SharePoint site search**, making it easier to find content across your organisation's sites.

#### 🎭 Personality Mode
Customise assistant behaviour with a new **Personality Mode** setting, plus new cloud CLI skills to extend what your agent can do.

#### 🛒 Custom Marketplace Sources
You can now **manage and add custom source registries** to the Marketplace, giving teams full control over their skill libraries.

---

### 🛠 Improvements

- **Tools shortcut & copy tool calls** — the chat interface gains a Tools shortcut and copy-to-clipboard for tool call results.
- **Workspace accordion** — sidebar workspace sections now collapse others when one is expanded.
- **Settings cleanup** — built-in sources removed from the marketplace tab; portal connections toggle consolidated into its own section.
- **Friendly ACP errors** — overloaded and rate-limited errors now show clear, human-readable messages.
- **Chat scroll** — instant scroll and deferred initial scroll for improved virtualiser reliability.

---

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- Fixed WebSocket auth — device ID is now persisted correctly and auth response field names corrected.
- Fixed reconnection reliability and idle heartbeat handling.
- Fixed onboarding delays — artificial waits removed from the CLI setup flow.

---

_Co-authored by [Nova](https://www.compassap.ai/portfolio/nova.html)_
